pi_items.source: Mathematical derivation of the total energy from the prompt's capacity and derate parameters yields ~2,166,570 kWh, which aligns with this lower bound checked by verifier.py.

privileged_info_summary: The task specifies synthetic parameters for a proposed small hydropower model without an external dataset. Explicit calculations based on the provided monthly capacity factors, nameplate capacity (500 kW), and derate factor (0.95) generate an expected total energy of ~2,166,570 kWh and a capacity factor of ~49.47%. Applying the designated financial parameters yields an LCOE of ~10.01 cents/kWh. All derived values precisely fall within the bounded evaluation intervals correctly defined in the metadata and strictly enforced by the task verifier. Target output file paths correspond explicitly to the task script checks.
